name: USS Zellars (DD 777)
events: 25 Mar 1945 USS Zellars arrived in the Okinawa area.
12 Apr 1945 USS Zellars is damaged by a Japanese kamikaze aircraft of Okinawa in position 26°00'N, 128°00'E. Zellars limped into Kerama Retto with extensive damage later that day.
1 Jun 1945 USS Zellars puts into Long Beach Naval Shipyard for permanent repairs.
